[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Oct 07, 2005 1:25 am Last seen in this thread http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=561 at least until gurochan instituted anti-leeching.

[]:             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Fri Oct 07, 2005 8:18 am Aargh, it's Sin City all over again!!! :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Fri Oct 07, 2005 2:34 pm Eggghhh... That is so disturbing.

[]:             Quote Post by The Sandman » Fri Oct 07, 2005 4:04 pm OMG. The Kaiser has attack! O_O Run!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Oct 07, 2005 9:46 pm Old. And a bit too big.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Oct 07, 2005 10:56 pm This crap again, yea. This peace of crap and the broken link of it last time lead me to look an gurochan for the frist time. May you burn in hell for making me see that

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Oct 10, 2005 1:57 am Literal Translation for what she says is I go to Germany

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Mon Oct 10, 2005 5:41 am Thank u for that TS, I'm sure we got the idea that it said sumtin like it. I kinda got the impression in high school that nothing translated directly into english is 100% correctly english, but its how its used in that language i guess...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 10, 2005 12:17 pm Timesplitter 01 wrote: Literal Translation for what she says is I go to Germany

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Oct 10, 2005 7:14 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Timesplitter 01 wrote: Literal Translation for what she says is I go to Germany

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Mon Oct 10, 2005 8:46 pm i saw that on a ytmnd a couple of days ago.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Tue Oct 11, 2005 9:03 am Well, any reasons I had to go to Germany have just been destroyed. I wouldn't put it passed Asuka to do something that effed up though. But WHY PenPen? He didn't deserve it... Then again, there aren't too many animals in the series so I guess the first one she sees is the logical one... I get to room in the fridge though.

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Wed Oct 26, 2005 1:49 am I DON'T KNOW! I'M GOING TO SUCK THE LIFE OUT OF YOU!

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Wed Nov 09, 2005 4:13 pm "Over done" .
